title: HasId
description: HasId: Condition that requires an object to own an AdapterId fragment with a given Id to be considered a pass.

Ids.description: Collection of ids, one of which needs to be found among object's AdapterId.Id fragment properties for it to pass.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
